Catecholamine Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are catecholamine tests? 
Catecholamines are a group of hormones made by your adrenal glands , two small glands located above your kidneys. Hormones act as chemical messengers in your bloodstream. They carry information that controls the actions of certain cells or organs. Â The main types of catecholamines are dopamine, norepinephrine, and epinephrine. Epinephrine is
